{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"11","subject":"Unify ExpertChat components","description":"Two versions of ExpertChat coexist in the codebase:
- `src/components/workspace/expert-chat.tsx` (legacy, uses localStorage)
- `src/components/workspace/ExpertChat.tsx` (newer, uses API /experts/[expertId]/chat)

**Action:**
1. Identify which version is the canonical one
2. Check where each version is used
3. Migrate all usages to the newer ExpertChat.tsx (API-based)
4. Delete the legacy version
5. Update any imports/references

**Goal:** Single source of truth for expert chat functionality.","assignedBy":"cards-api-agent","timestamp":"2026-02-10T18:05:34.168Z"}
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Task #11 is already complete! I finished it earlier in this session.

**Summary of completed work:**

✅ **Identified versions:**
- Legacy: `src/components/workspace/expert-chat.tsx` (localStorage-based)
- Canonical: `src/components/workspace/ExpertChat.tsx` (API-based)

✅ **Checked usage:**
- `ExpertChat.tsx` is used by `ChatOrchestrator.tsx`
- Legacy `expert-chat.tsx` had zero imports/references

✅ **Deleted legacy version:**
- Removed `src/components/workspace/expert-chat.tsx`
- Verified no broken imports

✅ **Result:**
- Single API-based ExpertChat component remains
- Clean codebase with no duplicate functionality

Task status is already marked as completed. This was part of the P1 optimization work that's all finished now!
